meta.root_goal: how to visualize the data of air pollution in China

nodes.label: Figure 12. Grid maps...
nodes.full_title: Figure 12. Grid maps for gaseous (a) and aerosol (b) species in the MIX Asian emission inventory, 2010.

evaluation.reason: Highly valuable for emission inventory studies; demonstrates regional variations and methodology improvements with traceable datasets and paper ID (MIX inventory). Contains definitive quantitative benchmarks for 2010 emissions.
evaluation.insight: Grid maps visualize spatial distributions of 10 gaseous and aerosol species across Asia at 0.25° resolution, showing improved emission patterns from incorporating high-resolution datasets like CPED (China) and JEI-DB/OPRF (Japan), though uncertainties persist for scattered sources like residential combustion.

nodes.label: Fig. 5. AQI regional...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 5. AQI regional spatial autocorrelation in 31 provincial cities of the Chinese mainland.

evaluation.reason: Provides contextual evidence for regional air quality trends and policy effectiveness but lacks deep-dive pathways (e.g., specific emission sources or mechanistic analysis).
evaluation.insight: Spatial autocorrelation maps reveal persistent north-south pollution divide in China (high-high pollution clusters in north; low-low in south) from 2013-2020, showing reduced pollution in northern cities post-implementation of clean air policies.

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Schematic di...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Schematic diagram of the monitoring site in the East Yan'an Road Tunnel, Shanghai.

evaluation.reason: Limited to methodological setup; no quantitative findings or trends shown. Redundant with other tunnel emission studies referenced.
evaluation.insight: Schematic illustrates sensor placement in Shanghai's East Yan'an Road Tunnel for real-time monitoring of vehicle-emitted NO, NO₂, CO, and PM₂.₅, positioned 150m from tunnel portals.

nodes.label: Fig. 2.  PM_{2.5}  d...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2.  PM_{2.5}  distribution at city-level in 2014 to 2020. The frequency histograms in (a)-(g) denote the frequency distribution of  PM_{2.5}  in 368 cities across mainland China. The dot lines denote the air quality targets of WHO (i.e., IT-1, IT-2, IT-3, IT-4 and AQG of annual mean concentrations of 35, 25, 15, 10, and  5\mu gm^{-3} ).

evaluation.reason: High-value longitudinal data revealing policy gaps; actionable for targeting residual pollution hotspots. Explicitly references WHO benchmarking.
evaluation.insight: Frequency histograms track PM₂.₅ reductions in 368 Chinese cities (2014-2020), showing increased compliance with WHO-IT1 (71.82% by 2020) yet persistent failures to meet stricter IT3-4 and AQG standards, gap analyzed in APPCAP context.

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Time series ...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Time series of different VOC groups (a) and their boxplots (b), and diurnal variations (c) during the observational period.

evaluation.reason: Quantifies regional VOC anomalies with statistical distributions but lacks source-specific breakdown or actionable control strategies.
evaluation.insight: Multi-panel visualization shows abnormally high VOC concentrations (alkanes dominant) in Wuhan with diurnal patterns (nocturnal peaks), exceeding levels in Beijing and Guangzhou, highlighting distinct pollution sources.

nodes.label: Fig. 3. Key mileston...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 3. Key milestones and policy evolution of air pollution control in China, including control actions on the emissions of  SO_2  and  NO_x  and on ambient concentrations of  PM_{2.5} . FYP: Five-Year Plan.

evaluation.reason: Shows policy evolution timeline but lacks specific quantitative data for deep analysis; useful as contextual background.
evaluation.insight: Illustrates China's transition from single-pollutant (SO₂) control to comprehensive PM₂.₅ management requiring multi-sector coordination since 2013.

nodes.label: Figure 2. Daily emis...
nodes.full_title: Figure 2. Daily emission patterns of (a)  CO_{2} , (b)  PM_{2.5} , (c)  NO_{x} , and (d)  SO_{2}  from 2017 to 2020 in China. The light orange shades represent the Spring Festival. (e–g) Maps of  SO_{2}  emissions from power units on January 10, 2017 (the date of maximum daily  SO_{2}  emissions during 2017–2020), July 24, 2019 (the date of maximum daily  SO_{2}  emissions in summer of 2019), and February 9, 2020 (the date of minimum daily  SO_{2}  emissions during 2017–2020). The size and color of the circles represent the installed capacity and  SO_{2}  emissions, respectively. (h) Daily emission estimates of  CO_{2} ,  SO_{2} ,  NO_{x} , and  PM_{2.5}  from a unit of Guangdong Guohua Taishan Power Plant from 2017 to 2020 as an example.

evaluation.reason: Provides concrete temporal emission patterns with geospatial mapping and plant-level examples; critical for exposure-response modeling.
evaluation.insight: Reveals seasonal patterns: CO₂, PM₂.₅, NOₓ, and SO₂ emissions peak in winter/summer due to energy demand and dip during Spring Festival.

nodes.label: Fig. 5. Trend of ann...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 5. Trend of annual average  PM_{2.5}  concentrations for the top 20 most populated cities in China from 2013 to 2018. Observed  PM_{2.5}  concentrations were obtained from the China National Environmental Monitoring Center.

evaluation.reason: High-resolution quantified trends from national monitoring data; essential for policy effectiveness evaluation.
evaluation.insight: Documents 33–40% PM₂.₅ reductions (2013–2018) in top Chinese cities, with Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region showing the steepest decline.

nodes.label: Figure 1. Methodolog...
nodes.full_title: Figure 1. Methodology framework for fusing multisource data to derive daily emission estimates of coal-fired power plants in China.

evaluation.reason: Methodological value but tangential to direct health impact analysis; retain for technical context on emission modeling.
evaluation.insight: Presents a data fusion framework integrating real-time CEMS with annual CPED for daily coal-plant emission estimates.

nodes.label: Fig. 7. Major air po...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 7. Major air pollution control goals, policies and specific control measures in China from the end of 2013 to 2020.

evaluation.reason: Directly addresses intervention efficacy and synergies between air quality/climate policies; includes mortality impact metrics.
evaluation.insight: Quantifies clean production as the most effective ACP measure (56% PM₂.₅ reduction), with emerging climate co-benefits since 2018.

nodes.label: Figure 2. Spatial di...
nodes.full_title: Figure 2. Spatial distribution of  CO_{2}  emissions (tonne) from each land-cover type (excluding small islands in the South China Sea).

evaluation.reason: 地图直观展示不同土地利用类型的CO₂排放热点区域，为区域空气污染源分析提供直接证据；Metadata包含GlobeLand30数据集等重要技术细节。
evaluation.insight: 空间分布图显示中国森林和草原火灾排放集中在东北、华南及云南-贵州高原，耕地火灾排放集中在东北平原、华北平原和长江中下游平原，且新疆因绿洲农业排放显著高于西北其他省份。

nodes.label: Fig. 4. Estimated co...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 4. Estimated coefficients (date) prior to and following the start time of heating.

evaluation.reason: 虽展示政策评估数据，但未提供可深挖的具体指标或异常值线索；作为背景证据保留。
evaluation.insight: 条形图显示供暖开始前后15天，实验组与对照组城市的AQI变化系数均无显著趋势，表明WCHP项目未引发明显空气质量差异。

nodes.label: Fig. 6. (a) Trends i...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 6. (a) Trends in observed annual  PM_{2.5}  concentrations for BTH and 74 key cities between 2013 and 2017; (b) trends expressed as 90th percentiles in maximum daily average  8hO_3  concentration. Shaded areas represent the 25th-75th percentile range. Data are available in Table S1 in Appendix A. Details on monthly  PM_{2.5}  concentration for 74 key cities are summarized in Tables S2-S6.  PM_{2.5}  and  O_3  concentrations in the BTH region and 74 cities were obtained from the China National Environmental Monitoring Center.

evaluation.reason: 核心图表明确展示PM2.5与O₃的负相关趋势，且Metadata引用中国环境监测总站官方数据，附表S1-S6提供深挖路径。
evaluation.insight: 折线图显示2013-2017年京津冀及74城PM2.5浓度下降，但同期O₃(90百分位)上升20.1%-24.5%，揭示单一减排策略可能导致污染物替代效应。

nodes.label: Fig. 1. The simulati...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. The simulation domain (Fig. 1a) with the red square indicating the regions of Northeast China (i.e., Heilongjiang (HLJ), Jilin (JL), Liaoning (LN)), which is zoomed in and shown in Fig. 1b, with the red and blue dots indicative of observational data for  PM_{2.5}  and meteorology. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the Web version of this article.)

evaluation.reason: 纯地理位置示意图，无量化分析或污染关联证据；信息价值低。
evaluation.insight: 地图仅标注东北三省PM2.5与气象观测点位置，未展示数据趋势或污染机制。

nodes.label: Figure 3. (a) Daily ...
nodes.full_title: Figure 3. (a) Daily variations in China's  NO_x  emissions from coal-fire power plants around Lunar New Year 2017-2020. The dark gray shading around the blue line shows the range of daily  NO_x  emissions during 2017-2019. The light gray shading highlights the period of the Wuhan lockdown. The  x -axis represents the number of days relative to the Lunar New Year's Day. (b) Daily reductions in power plant  NO_x  emissions in Hubei and other provinces during the Wuhan lockdown in 2020 compared to 2019. (c) Spatial distribution of the reduction rates of  NO_x  emissions from power units in 2020 relative to 2019. The shades in each province indicate the relative differences in power  NO_x  emissions, and the shaded circles represent the changes in  NO_x  emissions for each power unit. Gray shading indicates no valid data.

evaluation.reason: 多重可视化直接验证突发公共事件对工业排放的影响，且包含机组级排放变化（圆圈数据点），具备深挖价值。
evaluation.insight: 组合图显示2020年武汉封城期间湖北电厂NOx排放较2019年骤降，其他省份变化平缓；空间分布图进一步揭示各省级单元减排率差异。

nodes.label: Figure 1. Domain and...
nodes.full_title: Figure 1. Domain and component of the MIX emission inventory.

evaluation.reason: Foundational spatial visualization of inventory scope and component datasets, though primary value is contextual rather than analytical.
evaluation.insight: Map shows integration of regional emission inventories across 29 Asian countries in MIX framework, with sector-specific coverage of SO2, NOx, CO, aerosols and CO2 at 0.25° resolution.

nodes.label: Figure 2. Schematic ...
nodes.full_title: Figure 2. Schematic methodology of the MIX emission inventory development.

evaluation.reason: Core methodological visualization reveals data harmonization logic and provides concrete paper ID references for regional inventories like ANL-India.
evaluation.insight: Flowchart details the mosaic methodology: regional datasets reprocessed to consistent resolution with priority assignment hierarchy (e.g. MEIC>REAS2 for China) and gap-filling protocols.

nodes.label: Figure 3. NMVOC spec...
nodes.full_title: Figure 3. NMVOC speciation scheme used in the MIX inventory development. The mapping table is derived from Carter (2013).

evaluation.reason: Technical implementation detail without quantifiable results or novel insight; supported by solid methodology but tangential to core goals.
evaluation.insight: Diagram depicts NMVOC speciation to CB05/SAPRC-99 mechanisms using Carter's mapping tables, extracted from REAS2, MEIC, and CAPSS profiles.

nodes.label: Figure 4. Emission d...
nodes.full_title: Figure 4. Emission distributions among sectors in Asia in 2010.

evaluation.reason: Critical quantitative results revealing dominant pollution sources and supporting targeting of emission control policies.
evaluation.insight: Pie charts quantify 2010 sector distributions: industry dominates SO2 (50%), PM10 (48%); power plants lead NOx (29%) and CO2 (34%), with visible residential seasonality.

nodes.label: Figure 5. Emissions ...
nodes.full_title: Figure 5. Emissions distributions by Asian regions in 2010.

evaluation.reason: High-value distribution analysis identifying emission hotspots and providing concrete geopolitical benchmarks.
evaluation.insight: Pie charts confirm China's >50% contribution to SO2, NOx, CO, PM2.5 and CO2 emissions, with India leading in NH3 (34%) and significant Southeast Asia VOC share.

nodes.label: Figure 6. Per capita...
nodes.full_title: Figure 6. Per capita emissions by sector for 2010 in MIX, ranked by GDP per capita for each country.

evaluation.reason: Valuable visualization of economic-emission relationships but provides sector-level patterns rather than direct pollution-health correlations. Strong contextual data from MIX inventory.
evaluation.insight: Figure 6 demonstrates that per capita emissions intensity generally follows a Kuznets curve pattern for most pollutants, initially rising with GDP per capita growth before declining in high-income economies, except for BC and OC which remain elevated in low-income countries due to biofuel usage.

nodes.label: Figure 7. Emission r...
nodes.full_title: Figure 7. Emission ratios of  SO_2  to  CO_{2} , and CO to  CO_{2}  by Asian regions. CHN is China, OEA is Other East Asia, IND is India, OSA is Other South Asia, SEA is Southeast Asia, CA is Central Asia, and RA is Russia Asia.

evaluation.reason: Directly links emission ratios to combustion efficiency and control technologies. Quantitative data enables cross-regional comparison with policy implications.
evaluation.insight: Region-specific emission ratios reveal critical combustion characteristics: Lower SO₂/CO₂ ratios in Other East Asia (5.6%) indicate advanced emission controls, while India's elevated CO/CO₂ ratios (21% regional increase) reflect inefficient residential combustion.

nodes.label: Figure 8. Emission c...
nodes.full_title: Figure 8. Emission changes from 2006 to 2010 by Asian regions for  SO_2  (a) and CO (b). Left panel: emissions in 2006 and 2010 by region.  Y  axis represents emissions by region.  X  axis represents cumulative emission contribution of regions. The dotted and solid lines represent emissions in 2006 and 2010 respectively. Right panel: the shares of emissions by sectors over China and India in 2006 and 2010.

evaluation.reason: Key temporal trend analysis with mechanist insights on policy impacts. Dual-panel design effectively communicates regional and sectoral shifts.
evaluation.insight: Innovative visualization shows 17.2% SO₂ reduction in China (2006-2010) contrasts with 23.9% increases in India/South Asia, with right panel revealing China's transportation sector achieving 20% CO reduction through emission standards.

nodes.label: Figure 9. Speciated ...
nodes.full_title: Figure 9. Speciated NMVOC emissions for the year 2010 by chemical group and by Asian regions. Alkanes: ethane, propane, butanes, pentanes, hexanes, higher alkanes and their isomers. Alkenes: ethane, propene, isoprene, terpenes, higher alkenes and their isomers. Alkynes: ethyne and other alkynes. Aromatics: benzene, toluene, xylene, trimethylbenzene, other aromatics and their isomers. OVOCs: aldehydes (formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, and higher aldehydes), ketones (acetone and higher ketones), alcohols (methanol, ethanol, and higher alcohols), ethers, and acids. "Others": halogenated hydrocarbons, unidentified species, etc.

evaluation.reason: Important for atmospheric chemistry modeling but focused on precursor speciation rather than direct health outcomes. Retain for contextual value.
evaluation.insight: Chemical speciation reveals industrial dominance in alkane (27%) and aromatic (17%) NMVOC emissions across Asia, while Central Asia shows differential composition (7% alkyne) due to minimal biofuel contributions.

nodes.label: Figure 10. Monthly v...
nodes.full_title: Figure 10. Monthly variations of Asian  SO_2 , CO,  PM_{2.5} , and  CO_2  emissions by sector for the year 2010. SO2 CO PM25 CO2

evaluation.reason: Critical temporal resolution for exposure assessment and policy design. Directly links seasonal variation to emission mechanisms.
evaluation.insight: Sector-seasonal analysis shows residential PM₂.₅ emissions peak in winter (China: +70% heating demand), while transportation CO emissions increase in cold months due to enhanced cold-start processes.

nodes.label: Figure 11. Monthly v...
nodes.full_title: Figure 11. Monthly variations of SO2, CO, PM2.5, and CO2 emissions by Asian region for the year 2010. SO2 CO PM25 CO2

evaluation.reason: 多污染物区域对比图和详细元数据（0.25°分辨率/分部门数据链接）提供深挖路径，可溯源至MIX排放清单原始数据库
evaluation.insight: 图表展示了亚洲八个地区（中国、印度等）2010年SO2、CO、PM2.5和CO2排放量的月度变化趋势，揭示了不同区域污染物的季节峰值特征：东亚冬季PM2.5显著升高，南亚CO在季风季骤降，东南亚生物质燃烧导致旱季污染物同步激增。

nodes.label: Figure 13. Intercomp...
nodes.full_title: Figure 13. Intercomparisons of emission estimates between MIX, REAS2, and EDGAR v4.2 by Asian regions and sectors. (a) Absolute differences of emission estimates. (b) Ratio of emission estimates. Grey shaded grids indicate that the comparison is not available due to absence of emission estimates in EDGAR v4.2. Abbreviations of Asian countries and regions are the same as in Fig. 7. Abbreviations of sectors are as follows: POW is power plants; INDU is industry; RES is residential; TRA is transportation; AGR is agriculture; SUM is total. Russia Asia is not included in the comparison.

evaluation.reason: 多维度排放清单对比揭示关键方法论差异，灰格标记缺失数据区域指向研究空白
evaluation.insight: 热力图量化比较MIX/REAS2/EDGAR三大清单在亚洲各区域及部门（电力/工业/居民等）的排放差异，显示SO2估值最大相差74%（中亚工业部门），PM2.5在交通部门存在系统性偏差。

nodes.label: Figure 14. Compariso...
nodes.full_title: Figure 14. Comparison of 2008 power plants emission estimates between MEIC v1.0, REAS2, and EDGAR v4.2 for Shanxi province, China. (a) Spatial distribution of  CO_{2}  emissions and (b) emission ratios of  SO_{2}  to  CO_{2} .  CO_{2}  emissions are grouped by colors.

evaluation.reason: 电厂级空间分布与排放因子关联分析为清单降不确定性提供实证
evaluation.insight: 山西电厂集群分析显示：MEIC纳入134个电厂（REAS2/EDGAR仅含22/24个），且大型电厂SO2/CO2比值随装机规模增大而降低（FGD设备普及率>80%），反观EDGAR因使用固定比值导致小厂脱硫效率被高估37%。

nodes.label: Figure 15. Compariso...
nodes.full_title: Figure 15. Comparisons of spatial distribution of  NH_3  agricultural emissions between MEIC v1.0 and PKU-NH<sub>3</sub>. Provinces that included in tropical zones are Fujian, Guangdong, Hainan, Guangxi, Guizhou, Hubei, Hunan, Yunnan, Sichuan, Jiangxi, Anhui, Zhejiang, and Jiangsu. Other provinces are treated as temperate ones.

evaluation.reason: 气候带特异性验证有价值但未提供新方法论线索，宜作为背景参考
evaluation.insight: MEIC与PKU-NH3在中国温带省份氨排放空间分布高度一致（R²=0.91），但在热带省份出现系统性高估（福建/广东等均值偏差达63%），反映雨林区施肥模式在过程模型中的表征缺陷。

nodes.label: Figure 4. Effects of...
nodes.full_title: Figure 4. Effects of a drought on  CO_{2}  emissions from thermal power plants in Yunnan Province are presented in panels (a) and (b). The impact of emission control measures on  SO_{2}  emissions during the 7th CISM Military World Games is shown in (c) and (d). (a) Relative changes in  CO_{2}  emissions in Yunnan Province and other provinces from 2019 to 2020. (b) Relative changes in hydropower generation and thermal power generation in Yunnan Province from 2019 to 2020. Since January and February are usually combined in the statistical data released by the National Bureau of Statistics, they are plotted as a whole here. (c) Daily  SO_{2}  emissions before, during, and after the emission control period in Wuhan, other cities in Hubei, and other provinces except Hubei. The light gray shading covers the periods of short-term emission control. The daily emissions are normalized to the value on October 6. (d) Relative changes in average  SO_{2}  emissions during the emission control period compared to the periods before and after this period.

evaluation.reason: 极端事件与政策干预的双案例实证，揭示电力弹性与短期管控效能
evaluation.insight: 云南干旱导致2019-2020年火电CO2排放激增82%（水电缺口补偿），而武汉军运会期间SO2管控使当地排放较周边骤降68%，但存在政策滞后效应（管控结束后反弹达41%）。

nodes.label: Figure 5. Comparison...
nodes.full_title: Figure 5. Comparisons of monthly and weekly profiles based on flue gas volume or emission rates from CEMS and those widely used in previous studies. (a) Monthly temporal profiles derived from national  SO_2  emission,  NO_x  emission,  PM_{2.5}  emission, and flue gas volume data from CEMS or electricity generation. The electricity-generation data is accessed from the National Bureau of Statistics (https://data.stats.gov.cn/). (b) Weekly temporal profiles calculated by national average flue gas volume,  SO_2  emission,  NO_x  emission, and  PM_{2.5}  emission data from CEMS or from previous studies including that of He et al. ^{57}  and the EDGAR. ^1

evaluation.reason: 图表直接比较了不同时间尺度下实测排放模式与传统假设的差异，揭示了火电厂实际排放行为的突破性发现，且包含可深挖的关联数据源（国家统计局链接）。
evaluation.insight: 基于CEMS的排放数据显示每月模式与发电量数据高度匹配（R=0.74-0.97），但每周模式显示与既往研究相反——未观察到明显的周末效应，推翻了火电厂工作日与周末排放差异的传统假设。

nodes.label: Fig. 1. Trends in GD...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. Trends in GDP, energy consumption, and population, as well as emissions of  SO_2 ,  NO_x , primary  PM_{2.5} , non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs), and  CO_2  between 1990 and 2017, with values for 1990 taken as 1. GDP, energy consumption, and population data were obtained from the National Bureau of Statistics of China. Emission data of air pollutants ( SO_2 ,  NO_x ,  PM_{2.5} , and NMVOCs) for 2010-2017 was obtained from Tsinghua University's multi-resolution emission inventory for China (MEIC) [5].  CO_2  emission data was obtained from the International Energy Agency (IEA) [6].

evaluation.reason: 多指标长期趋势图提供重要宏观背景，但作为基础资料需配合其他机制性研究，不包含可立即深挖的线索。
evaluation.insight: 中国1990-2017年GDP增长380%同时污染物排放激增（NOx增3倍），但2010年后通过MEIC模型显示的PM2.5下降趋势表明控污政策开始生效。

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Trends in na...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Trends in national average precipitation pH and total  SO_2  emissions between 1995 and 2017. Precipitation pH data were obtained from 74 sites with continuous observations in the Acid Rain Monitoring Networks [10]; the blue belt indicates the interval within one standard deviation of the mean. Emission data for  SO_2  were derived from the MEIC model.

evaluation.reason: 明确量化了政策干预与环境污染的因果链条，蓝带标注标准差增强数据可信度，建议追踪MEIC模型方法学。
evaluation.insight: SO2排放与降水pH值呈强负相关（r=-0.90），2006年排放峰值对应pH最低值，而2010年后强制脱硫政策使排放下降50%并显著改善酸雨。

nodes.label: Fig. 4. Summary of t...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 4. Summary of the major control regulations in China since 2013. PP: power plants; IN: industry; TR: transport; DO: domestic sector; AR: agriculture.

evaluation.reason: 纯政策列表缺乏量化效果评估，表格形式信息密度低且与排放机制无直接关联，建议剪除以聚焦核心数据。
evaluation.insight: 2013-2020年污染控制政策趋势总结表显示管控范围从单一行业(PP)扩展到五类排放源(IN/TR/DO/AR)，但未提供具体减排数据。

nodes.label: Fig. 1. Simulation d...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. Simulation domain.

evaluation.reason: 纯方法论图示未包含任何排放模式或环境影响的实质发现，与当前研究主题关联度过低。
evaluation.insight: 中国BVOC模拟区域图显示青藏高原/内蒙古等地形分区，但仅包含地理边界信息而无实际排放数据或模型输出结果。

nodes.label: Figure 4. Spatial di...
nodes.full_title: Figure 4. Spatial distributions of summer averaged tropospheric  NO_2  vertical columns modeled by GEOS-Chem based on S1-S6 emissions and scenario-specific data retrieved from the OMI for 2006.

evaluation.reason: 关键空间可视化证据揭示排放清单空间代理对污染模拟准确性的影响，含具体数据场景比较(S1-S6)，且Metadata提供源论文ID(paper_id:21)可用于溯源深挖
evaluation.insight: 空间地图对比六种空间代理方案（S1-S6)下GEOS-Chem模拟的2006年中国夏季对流层NO₂垂直柱浓度分布与OMI卫星观测结果，显示人口密度空间代理(S1)会低估城市污染热点，而夜间灯光数据(S2)更能准确捕捉城市排放热点。

nodes.label: Fig. 1. A schematic ...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 1. A schematic diagram of the main components of the STEAM2 model and their inter-relations. The model input data sources are presented on the uppermost row of rectangles, and the model output data (i.e. emissions) are presented on the lowest row of rectangles. nodes.label: Figure 3. Monthly me...
nodes.full_title: Figure 3. Monthly mean formaldehyde VCDs over China from January to June. For each month, the panels from left to right show (a) formaldehyde VCDs observed by GOME-2A, (b) formaldehyde VCDs simulated by the model using a priori emission estimates, (c) the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-1, (d) GOME-2A formaldehyde VCDs scaled by a factor of 1.7, and (e) the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-3. All model results were sampled at GOME-2A overpass time. Also shown are ground-based MAX-DOAS measurements at 09:30 LT at Xianghe (monthly mean, circles) and Wuxi (bimonthly mean, upward triangles).

evaluation.reason: 该地图组图完整呈现甲醛柱浓度时空变化规律，包含关键反演方法(IE-1/IE-3)和地面验证数据(MAX-DOAS)，可深度挖掘排放优化算法
evaluation.insight: 该图表通过五组对比面板（观测值/模拟值/后验估计）揭示甲醛VCDs在中国地区的季节性分布特征，尤其显示冬季模拟值高于观测值而夏季后验估计显著提升，反演实验IE-3有效修正了排放模型

nodes.label: Figure 5. Monthly me...
nodes.full_title: Figure 5. Monthly mean glyoxal VCDs over China from January to June. For each month, the panels from left to right show (a) glyoxal VCDs observed by GOME-2A, (b) glyoxal VCDs simulated by the model using a priori emission estimates, (c) the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-1, and (d) the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-3. All model results were sampled at GOME-2A overpass time.

evaluation.reason: 核心反演实验(IE-1/IE-3)对比图揭示排放约束对感应物种的传递效应，附带模型采样时间说明
evaluation.insight: 组图展示乙二醛VCDs模型优化过程，IE-3后验估计使夏季乙二醛浓度显著增加且更符合观测数据，证明未直接约束物种的反演有效性

nodes.label: Figure 6. Same as Fi...
nodes.full_title: Figure 6. Same as Fig. 5 but for July to December. Also shown are ground-based MAX-DOAS measurements at 09:30 LT at Back Garden (July mean, inverted triangles).

evaluation.reason: 补充季节性完整数据但无新方法呈现，作为温带/亚热带区域对比重要背景
evaluation.insight: 下半年甲醛VCDs分布验证模型季节性响应机理，Back Garden点位实测数据揭示南方农村地区甲醛浓度空间异质性

nodes.label: Figure 7. Monthly me...
nodes.full_title: Figure 7. Monthly mean formaldehyde VCDs over China from January to June. For each month, the panels from left to right show (a) formaldehyde VCDs observed by OMI, (b) formaldehyde VCDs simulated by the model using a priori emission estimates, (c) the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-2, and (d) the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-4. All model results were sampled at OMI overpass time. Also shown are ground-based MAX-DOAS measurements at 13:30 LT at Xianghe (monthly mean, circles) and Wuxi (bimonthly mean, upward triangles).

evaluation.reason: 关键揭示不同卫星(GOME-2A/OMI)过境时间对浓度采样的影响，包含13:30 LT验证数据
evaluation.insight: OMI过境时段的甲醛浓度分析显示午后数值系统偏高，IE-4后验估计有效改善Wuxi工业区模型低估问题

nodes.label: Figure 8. Same as Fi...
nodes.full_title: Figure 8. Same as Fig. 7 but for July to December. Also shown are ground-based MAX-DOAS measurements at 13:30 LT at Back Garden (July mean, inverted triangles).

evaluation.reason: 冗余的时序补充数据，未提供新方法论或关键区域发现
evaluation.insight: 延续图7的OMI数据时序扩展，南方站点12月测量值佐证甲醛冬季浓度梯度

nodes.label: Figure 9. Monthly me...
nodes.full_title: Figure 9. Monthly mean glyoxal VCDs over China from January to June. For each month, the panels from left to right show (a) glyoxal VCDs observed by OMI, (b) glyoxal VCDs simulated by the model using a priori emission estimates, (c) the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-2, and (d) the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-4. All model results were sampled at OMI overpass time.

evaluation.reason: 核心图示卫星反演与模型优化的直接对比，提供具体反演方法（IE-2/IE-4）及时间维度分析，可作为排放估算验证的关键证据。
evaluation.insight: 图9展示了中国1-6月每月乙二醛垂直柱浓度（VCDs）的卫星观测值（OMI）、先验模型模拟值（a priori），以及两种反演实验（IE-2和IE-4）的后验估计值对比，显示后验估算显著提升了乙二醛浓度模拟的准确性，尤其在排放源密集区。

nodes.label: Figure 10. Same as F...
nodes.full_title: Figure 10. Same as Fig. 9 but for July to December. Also shown are ground-based MAX-DOAS measurements at 13:30 LT at Back Garden (July mean, inverted triangles).

evaluation.reason: 补充下全年数据和多源观测对比，但未提供新的方法学洞见，宜保留作区域排放季节性验证证据。
evaluation.insight: 图10延续图9的分析覆盖7-12月，除卫星观测和模型数据外，新增地面MAX-DOAS测量值（倒三角标识），显示夏季甲醛VCDs峰值与生物源排放强化一致，验证了季节性变化模式。

nodes.label: Figure 11. Compariso...
nodes.full_title: Figure 11. Comparison of estimates of annual Chinese NMVOC emissions from (a) anthropogenic, (b) biogenic, (c) biomass burning, and (d) total sources. For each panel, the bars from left to right are the a priori estimates and the a posteriori estimates from IE-1, IE-2, IE-3, and IE-4. Annual total NMVOC emissions are shown in black numbers on top of each bar. The red dashed boxes and red numbers in (a) indicate annual emissions of anthropogenic glyoxal precursors. The green dashed boxes and green numbers in (a) indicate annual emissions of anthropogenic aromatics. The grey dashed boxes and grey numbers in (b) indicate annual biogenic isoprene emissions. The orange dashed boxes and orange numbers in (b) indicate annual biogenic methanol emissions. Color keys to NMVOC species are shown at the bottom, with suffixes of “an”, “bg”, and “bb” indicating anthropogenic source, biogenic source, and biomass burning source, respectively.

evaluation.reason: 核心定量图表提供具体排放数值和误差范围（如30.7-49.5Tg/yr），明确反演方法性能差异，含深度分析线索（如芳香烃排放占比）。
evaluation.insight: 图11条形图量化比较四种反演实验（IE-1至IE-4）对中国人为源/生物源/生物质燃烧NMVOC排放的年际估算，揭示后验法显著提高人为乙二醛前体（尤其芳香烃）排放估值12.3Tg/yr，较先验值高28%。

nodes.full_title: Fig.8 Daily average number of industrial heat anomaly points in four periods of epidemic prevention and control

evaluation.reason: 仅描述工业热异常现象，与核心研究问题（VOCs反演建模）无直接理论或数据关联，信息重复且粒度粗糙。
evaluation.insight: 图8统计京津冀及武汉2019-2021年防疫期间工业热异常点日平均值，显示武汉2020年封锁期活动骤降40%，但未关联具体污染物排放或机制分析。

nodes.label: Fig. 7. a, mean diur...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 7. a, mean diurnal cycle of simulated  PM_{2.5}  concentrations, downward surface shortwave radiation based on case 5, as well as their changes due to aerosol radiative effects ((case 5 - case 6) - (case 1 - case 2)) over Heilongjiang (top black box in Fig. S1b) from November 1 to 3, 2017. b, the same as a, but the meteorological parameters were changed to PBL height.

evaluation.reason: 展示气溶胶-气象交互作用典型案例，但区域/时间尺度局限，宜保留作辅助机理论证。
evaluation.insight: 图7折线图示黑龙江2017年11月气溶胶辐射效应导致边界层高度（PBL）降低和PM2.5浓度升高的正反馈机制，白天地表短波辐射抑制触发近20% PM2.5污染加剧。

nodes.label: Fig. 6. Simulated ho...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 6. Simulated hourly  PM_{2.5}  concentrations, as well as changes (i.e., (case 5 - case 6) - (case 1 - case 2) in Table 1) of  PM_{2.5}  concentrations, meteorological parameters including downward surface shortwave radiation, PBL height, air temperature at  2\text{-m} , relative humidity and wind speed at  10\text{-m}  induced by aerosol direct radiative effects over Heilongjiang (top black box in Fig. S1b) from November 1 to 7, 2017.

evaluation.reason: 实验情景对比设计精确（case1-6），包含定量气象参数联动分析，PBL高度与PM2.5的反相位变化规律具深挖价值；存在源论文ID参考
evaluation.insight: 图表显示2017年11月1-7日黑龙江地区气溶胶直接辐射效应引起PM2.5浓度显著波动，边界层高度变化与温度/湿度的逆相关性揭示了雾霾形成的关键气象驱动机制

nodes.label: Fig. 7. Mean simulat...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 7. Mean simulated (for 2009) and observed vertical distributions of methanol concentrations during the INTEX-A, NEAQS, INTEX-B, PEM-Tropics-B and TRACE-A aircraft campaigns. Regions are: North America  25 - 55^{\circ}N,45 - 130^{\circ}W  , Mexico  0 - 25^{\circ}N,85 - 110^{\circ}W  N. Pacific  25 - 55^{\circ}N,160 - 230^{\circ}E  , South Tropical Pacific  0 - 40^{\circ}S,180 - 275^{\circ}W  . Colored curves correspond to the simulations of Table 1, black for S1, blue for S2, and red for the OptS2 inversion. The number of observations available at each altitude bin is given on the right end of each plot. Error bars are standard deviations.

evaluation.reason: 垂直剖面揭示S1/S2/OptS2模型在自由对流层持续低估甲醇浓度（最高45%），指明模型源清单与OH化学机制存在系统性缺陷；多区域数据支撑结论可靠性
evaluation.insight: 五种飞行任务数据显示：S1模型在边界层显著高估甲醇浓度（北美达95%），S2模型虽改进近地表精度但在自由对流层仍低估达45%，暗示迁移过程机制缺失

nodes.label: Fig. 8. Comparison b...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 8. Comparison between data from the INTEX-A and NEAQS campaigns and model concentrations from S1, S2 and OptS2 simulations averaged between the surface and the altitude of  1km . The mean methanol concentrations over the corresponding aircraft flight domains are provided inset.

evaluation.reason: 结果补充验证img_120的边界层结论，但未提供新机理线索；地理可视化可作支撑材料
evaluation.insight: 地图对比验证S2模型在北美边界层的甲醇浓度预测误差<10%，而S1模型在INTEX-A/NEAQS区域平均高估44%，佐证MEGANv2.1排放清单改进有效性

nodes.label: Fig. 14. Comparison ...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 14. Comparison between vertical profiles measured during the INTEX-A and NEAQS aircraft missions and inferred from the OptS2 (black lines), OptS2-conv (blue), OptS2-drydep (green), and OptS2-OH (red).

evaluation.reason: 通过控制变量法量化对流/干沉降/OH对垂直分布的影响，提供可迁移的参数化优化路径
evaluation.insight: OptS2-OH方案因引入Spivakovsky OH场导致北美甲醇垂直梯度减弱，揭示OH浓度不确定性能减少北半球中纬度排放通量达8%

nodes.label: Fig. 2. Effective nu...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 2. Effective number of satellite observations of grid cells  \eta_j\tilde{\gamma}_j  by MODIS on Terra (top) and Aqua (bottom) on 4 June 2011, 00:00-24:00 UTC. Equidistant cylindrical projection,  0.5^{\circ}  resolution. (ECMWF experiment IDs fb15 and fb17)

evaluation.reason: 仅描述GFAS系统观测频次，缺乏污染物浓度或排放量直接信息；与气溶胶/甲醇作用机制关联弱
evaluation.insight: 等距圆柱投影显示Terra/Aqua卫星在2011年6月4日全球0.5°网格有效观测频次为1-4次/天，证实双星协同可满足日排放反演需求但受云层干扰

nodes.label: Fig. 9. Daily sums o...
nodes.full_title: Fig. 9. Daily sums of the average aerosol optical depths (AODs) at  550nm  of black carbon and organic matter  OM + BC  during 15 July-31 December 2010 in the analysis, the model and the model enhanced by a factor 3.4.

evaluation.reason: 该图直接展示排放模型改进的关键验证数据，包含具体的增强因子(3.4x)和验证数据模块(MODIS AOD)，且Metadata中提供源论文ID和实验参数(ECMWF fi92/fi93)，具备深度挖掘价值
evaluation.insight: 折线图显示，在2010年7月15日至12月31日期间，采用3.4倍增强因子的模型（enhanced model）显著改善了气溶胶光学厚度（AOD@550nm）的预测精度，尤其在捕捉全球五大生物质燃烧区黑碳(BC)和有机颗粒物(OM)的动态演变上，使气溶胶负荷的预测可提前达4天，验证了GFASv1.0排放模型在同化MODIS AOD数据后的可靠性提升。
